title: Two Sum
description: Find two numbers that add to target
hints: Conceptual: Track what value you need to complete the target.
Pattern: Use a hash map for complement lookup in one pass.
Near-solution: For each x at i, check if target-x exists in map; if yes return indices.

title: Container With Most Water
description: Find max area between two lines
hints: Conceptual: Area depends on width and the shorter height.
Pattern: Start with two pointers at both ends.
Near-solution: Move the pointer at the shorter line inward each step.

title: Coin Change
hints: Conceptual: Build best answers for smaller amounts first.
Pattern: Bottom-up DP over amounts from 0 to target.
Near-solution: dp[a] = min(dp[a], dp[a-coin]+1) whenever a-coin >= 0.

title: Number of Islands
hints: Conceptual: Each connected land component is one island.
Pattern: Scan grid and run DFS/BFS from unvisited land cells.
Near-solution: Increment count on new land, then flood-fill to mark it visited.
